description: Evals for S5 dv-tb-scaffold: VIP generation, RAL model, UVM env scaffold

test_cases.name: AHB+SPI+I2C multi-protocol DUT scaffold
test_cases.description: DUT has AHB-Lite slave for registers, SPI master output, I2C master output, and AXI4 slave data input. Tests VIP deduplication (unique protocols), RAL generation from 5 registers, and full env scaffold.

assertions.description: 4 unique VIPs identified: ahb_vip, axi4s_vip, spi_vip, i2c_vip
assertions.check: unique_vip_count == 4 AND vip_names contains ahb_vip AND axi4s_vip AND spi_vip AND i2c_vip

assertions.description: Each VIP has all 11 component files generated
assertions.check: for each vip: _if.sv, _seq_item.sv, _cfg.sv, _driver.sv, _monitor.sv, _sequencer.sv, _coverage.sv, _agent.sv, _base_seq.sv, _reset_seq.sv, _agent_pkg.sv all present

assertions.description: RAL model generated with 5 registers and correct AHB adapter
assertions.check: ral/data_gw_reg_block.sv exists AND contains 5 register handles AND ahb_vip_ral_adapter.sv exists

assertions.description: All env files generated
assertions.check: env_cfg, ref_model, scoreboard, env, virtual_seqr, tb_top, dut_stub, env_pkg all present

assertions.description: Parameterized VIPs: AXI4-Stream uses DATA_WIDTH=64, AHB uses DATA_WIDTH=32
assertions.check: axi4s_vip_if.sv parameter DATA_WIDTH default=64 AND ahb_vip_if.sv parameter DATA_WIDTH default=32

assertions.description: Interface files include clocking blocks, modports, and SVA comment block
assertions.check: each _if.sv contains clocking driver_cb AND clocking monitor_cb AND modport master_mp AND modport monitor_mp

assertions.description: RAL adapter uses correct VIP: ahb_vip_ral_adapter
assertions.check: ahb_vip_ral_adapter.sv exists AND reg_block.sv includes ahb_vip_ral_adapter

assertions.description: dv_tb_data.json output file written with correct schema
assertions.check: dv_tb_data.json contains project_name=data_gw, unique_vips array len=4, ral.reg_count=5

assertions.description: DUT stub has correct module name and safe output assignments
assertions.check: data_gw_dut_stub.sv contains module data_gw_dut AND TODO port comments for each interface

assertions.description: env.sv instantiates all 4 agents with correct parameterization
assertions.check: data_gw_env.sv contains m_ahb_reg_if_agent AND m_axi4s_in_if_agent AND m_spi_out_if_agent AND m_i2c_out_if_agent

test_cases.name: Dual TileLink instances with different data widths
test_cases.description: DUT has two TileLink interfaces with different data widths (256-bit and 128-bit) — tests single parameterized VIP with two different parameter sets. Also has APB slave for registers.

assertions.description: Only 2 unique VIPs: tilelink_vip (used twice) and apb_vip — not 3 separate VIPs
assertions.check: unique_vip_count == 2 AND vip_names contains tilelink_vip AND apb_vip

assertions.description: TileLink VIP is parameterized: interface instantiated twice with different DATA_WIDTH
assertions.check: tb_top.sv contains tilelink_vip_if #(.DATA_WIDTH(256)) u_tl_wide_if AND tilelink_vip_if #(.DATA_WIDTH(128)) u_tl_narrow_if

assertions.description: TileLink interface signals match TileLink Channel A and D (a_opcode, d_opcode etc.)
assertions.check: tilelink_vip_if.sv contains a_opcode AND a_address AND a_valid AND d_opcode AND d_data AND d_valid

assertions.description: APB RAL adapter generated (apb_vip_ral_adapter)
assertions.check: apb_vip_ral_adapter.sv exists AND contains uvm_reg_adapter

assertions.description: env instantiates m_tl_wide_if_agent and m_tl_narrow_if_agent as separate instances
assertions.check: tl_router_env.sv contains m_tl_wide_if_agent AND m_tl_narrow_if_agent

assertions.description: Virtual sequencer has sequencer handles for all 3 interface instances
assertions.check: tl_router_virtual_seqr.sv contains m_apb_reg_if_seqr AND m_tl_wide_if_seqr AND m_tl_narrow_if_seqr

assertions.description: APB interface includes clocking blocks with correct APB signals
assertions.check: apb_vip_if.sv contains paddr AND psel AND penable AND pwrite AND pwdata AND prdata AND pready

test_cases.name: No prior skill outputs — user provides interface info interactively
test_cases.description: No S1/S2/S3/S4 outputs available. Skill must ask user for interface list, register map, and other missing info. Tests the interactive fallback path.

assertions.description: Skill asks for interface list when no S1 JSON provided
assertions.check: skill output contains question asking user to list DUT interfaces

assertions.description: 2 unique VIPs generated: apb_vip and uart_vip
assertions.check: unique_vip_count == 2 AND vip_names contains apb_vip AND uart_vip

assertions.description: UART interface signals: txd, rxd, rts_n, cts_n
assertions.check: uart_vip_if.sv contains txd AND rxd

assertions.description: RAL generated with 2 registers (UART_CTRL, UART_STATUS)
assertions.check: apb_uart_reg_block.sv contains uart_ctrl AND uart_status handles

assertions.description: Terminal summary mentions which VIPs were generated and what TODOs remain
assertions.check: output contains TODO count for drive_item tasks AND collect_transaction tasks

assertions.description: Skill asks user about reference model existence before generating ref_model.sv
assertions.check: skill output contains question about reference model before writing ref_model file
